'''chatate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:planometrically|planometrically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:planometrically|planometrically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chatate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chatate|chatate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chatatesher|chatatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chatatesherĂ«m|chatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chatatero|chatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chatateshĂ«|chatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chatateshĂ«m|chatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichatatero|gokichatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichatateshĂ«|gokichatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichatateshĂ«m|gokichatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochatankerom|gochatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochatankeshĂ«|gochatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochatankeshĂ«m|gochatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochatankeya|gochatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chataterom|chataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chatatemu|chatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chatateya|chatateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichataterom|gokichataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichatatemu|gokichatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichatateya|gokichatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chatatate|chatatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chatatatesher|chatatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chatatatesherĂ«m|chatatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chatatatero|chatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chatatateshĂ«|chatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chatatateshĂ«m|chatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichatatatero|gokichatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichatatateshĂ«|gokichatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichatatateshĂ«m|gokichatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochatatankerom|gochatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochatatankeshĂ«|gochatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochatatankeshĂ«m|gochatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochatatankeya|gochatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chatataterom|chatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chatatatemu|chatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chatatateya|chatatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichatataterom|gokichatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichatatatemu|gokichatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichatatateya|gokichatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠtĂŠte|chĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠtĂŠtesher|chĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠtĂŠtero|chĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠtĂŠtero|gokichĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠtĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠtĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠtĂŠterom|chĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠtĂŠtemu|chĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠtĂŠteya|chĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠtĂŠterom|gokichĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠtĂŠteya|gokichĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chaftafte|chaftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chaftaftesher|chaftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chaftaftesherĂ«m|chaftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chaftaftero|chaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chaftafteshĂ«|chaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chaftafteshĂ«m|chaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichaftaftero|gokichaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichaftafteshĂ«|gokichaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichaftafteshĂ«m|gokichaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochaftafnkerom|gochaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochaftafnkeshĂ«|gochaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochaftafnkeshĂ«m|gochaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochaftafnkeya|gochaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chaftafterom|chaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chaftaftemu|chaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chaftafteya|chaftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichaftafterom|gokichaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichaftaftemu|gokichaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichaftafteya|gokichaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
